notes: Session finished. The entire desktop inquiry page structure has been built, styled, and animated. We perfected the Goodfella-style logo flip, timeline spacing, and typography scale to feel premium. Next session MUST focus entirely on: 1) Mobile responsive optimization (stacking, font scaling, touch interactions). 2) Building the CTA booking experience (integrating Cal.com via dark-mode modal for a seamless, premium close).
key_decisions: Rejected direct copying of animations. Documented the 'Scroll-Scrubbed Bending Wave' pattern into the Motion Design Research Library, but replaced it in production with an Awwwards-style Hover Blur + Highlight Focus interaction for a more original premium feel.
Swapped the structural order of the page: Engagements (Pricing) now comes FIRST immediately after the Hero, followed by 'What's in a build'.
Shrunk the typography scale considerably to match premium, editorial restraint seen in the Good Fella reference.
Locked the BEVAMPED core color psychology to Gallery Obsidian (#0A0A0B) and Cool Plaster (#F5F6F8), moving strictly away from generic SaaS Navy.
Established a definitive, untouchable typography stack (Jost + Cormorant Garamond Italics + Manrope) that balances structural architecture with high-fashion editorial.
Shifted hover-based interactions to click-based interactions (e.g., FAQ text scramble) to enforce intentionality ('decoding') over chaotic reactive states.
Avoided native HTML <details> constraints by building a custom accordion using display: grid with 0fr to 1fr transitions for buttery smooth height expansion without JavaScript calculation.
Standardized text reveal animations using a kinetic GSAP split-text approach to ensure smooth, synchronized typography entrances across all major sections.
